title: Nie's Improved Recipes
description: A simple datapack to add or alter recipes which just make sense!
body:
Note of warning; I 100% intended this as a datapack and just used Modrinths inner mod maker to convert the datapack into a mod so if a bug exists in the mod version but not in the datapack version, I cannot fix it and I apologise. 

Datapacks however are cool. You just need to put them into .minecraft/saves/<world_name>/datapacks and then anyone who joins the world will have access to it instead of downloading 1 more mod!

Adds the following recipes
- Stairs, Slabs, Doors, Trapdoors, Buttons, and Pressure Plates have better block to block ratios
- Chain recipe has better ratio
- Logs to Wood made equal
- Increased stone types when crafting items and blocks with stone (e.g furnace)
- Recipes for the saddle, horse armours, name tag, trident, enchanted golden apple, and several dyes
- Unpacking recipes for blocks such as Packed Ice to Ice
- Smelting Blocks of Raw Ore to Blocks of Smelted Ore
- Other wooden storage for Hoppers (can use barrels and trapped chests)
- Chainmail Armour
- Horse Armour
- Nautilis Armour
- Logical Elytra Recipe
- Revitalise Coral + turn Coral and Coral Fans into Blocks
- Sherd Copying
- An updated Trim and Smithing Template Recipe
- Bells
- Cakes now have berries
- Mushroom Blocks
- Leaf Litter
- Dead Bush
- Packing for Snow Layers
- Cobblestone to Gravel

Along with Cauldron Crafting
- Dirt to Mud
- Magma Block to Obsidian
- Concrete Powders to Concretes
